questions.question: Explain the four phases of the Unified Process and describe the key activities in each phase.
expectedPoints: Inception - establish business case, scope, risks
Construction - build system through design, implementation, testing
Transition - deploy to users, beta testing, training

questions.question: How does the Team Software Process (TSP) extend the Personal Software Process (PSP)?
expectedPoints: PSP focuses on individual improvement, TSP on team
TSP builds on PSP principles for team coordination
TSP adds team roles and launch process
